text.tspan: Share of CO₂ emissions covered by a carbon price, 2024
Carbon dioxide emissions are included in this figure if they are covered by a carbon tax or trading system.
Ireland – Covered by a carbon tax or an
Denmark – Covered by a carbon tax or
South Korea – Covered by a carbon tax
Luxembourg – Covered by a carbon tax
Netherlands – Covered by a carbon tax
Bulgaria – Covered by a carbon tax or an
France – Covered by a carbon tax
Estonia – Covered by a carbon tax or an
Spain – Covered by a carbon tax or an
Belgium – Covered by a carbon tax or an
Netherlands – Covered by a carbon tax
United Kingdom – Covered by a carbon
United States – Covered by a carbon tax
Afghanistan – Covered by a carbon tax
